// Venture Partner · Contrarian Builder

GuillaumeLauzier

Backing product-obsessed founders building infrastructure we don't yet realize we're dependent on. From the mathematical certainty of Blockchain and Cybersecurity to the generative power of AI and Digital Art.

Submit a Pitch Advisory

The Operator

Who I Back.

I don't chase consensus. If your idea is popular, I'm probably too late. If people are calling it "too technical" or "too niche," you have my attention.

I provide the first check for ideas that sound like science fiction today — but will be the standard tomorrow. Protocol design, AI implementation, cryptographic hardening: I've built in these trenches.

My edge is cross-sector pattern recognition — seeing how a Cybersecurity protocol affects Digital Art provenance, and how AI reshapes eCommerce margins before the market prices it in.

Strategic Architecture →
10
Sector Primitives
3
Engagement Models
2–3
High-conviction bets / year

Sector Primitives

The Diagnostic.

Twelve sectors. Three families. One thesis: I only invest in rails, protocols, and engines — never in features.

The Backbone
Digital Infrastructure
+

"I architect the resilient, low-latency rails that move data from centralized silos to sovereign edge-nodes."

The Backbone
Cybersecurity
+

"I move teams beyond reactive defense to proactive, zero-trust cryptographic hardening of their core IP."

The Backbone
Blockchain
+

"I bridge the gap between speculative hype and functional protocol design, focusing on verifiable ownership and automated governance."

The Intelligence
Artificial Intelligence
+

"I help founders move past the 'wrapper' layer to build proprietary inference engines and private-data moats."

The Intelligence
Data & Analytics
+

"I architect the data layer — ZKML systems, verifiable analytics, and distributed data centers that fuel AI inference and create defensible decision-making moats."

The Intelligence
Fintech
+

"I architect the transition from legacy banking rails to real-time, programmable money and automated compliance layers."

The Intelligence
eCommerce
+

"I rebuild the stack for headless, borderless commerce that prioritizes direct-to-consumer sovereignty and frictionless settlement."

The Expression
Design & Architecture
+

"I apply engineering-level precision to aesthetic systems, ensuring high-end UI becomes a functional barrier to entry for competitors."

The Expression
Digital Art
+

"I treat art as a programmable asset, architecting new standards for provenance, royalties, and cross-platform utility."

The Expression
Entertainment
+

"I design the backend infrastructure for decentralized media distribution, returning power from the platforms to the creators."

The Expression
Marketing & Content
+

"I build AI-accelerated workflows that turn content from a cost center into a high-velocity, data-driven feedback loop."

The Expression
EdTech
+

"I architect the next generation of learning infrastructure, replacing centralized credentialing with programmable, verifiable skill networks."

Portfolio

Active Bets.

Conviction-weighted positions in protocols and primitives. Infrastructure over apps — always.

AI · Design & Architecture
Scenographist

Spatial design and scenographic systems. Applying architectural precision to immersive physical and digital environments.

Live · scenographist.com
Digital Art
GeneratedArt

Generative art platform at scale. Algorithmic creativity with on-chain provenance and programmable aesthetics.

Live · generatedart.com
Cybersecurity
Algosize

Security-first engineering that fuses high-performance computation with privacy-preserving cryptography — architecting resilient, cryptographically sound infrastructure for the next era of secure AI and finance.

Live · algosize.com
Blockchain · EdTech
Tokenomic

An education platform bridging DeFi to centralized communities, teaching token economy design, incentive mechanisms, and how to model and understand tokenomics in practice.

Live · tokenomic.org
Fintech · AI
GeFi

Decentralized, privacy-preserving AI models fuse with programmable financial primitives to build the intelligent, sovereign foundation for the next era of finance.

Live · gefi.io
Entertainment · Content
VJs Mag

The canonical publication for the global visual music and live visuals community. Infrastructure for the creator economy of AV art.

Live · vjsmag.com
Entertainment
VJs TV

Live visual performance broadcasting. Real-time generative video streaming for the decentralized media era.

Live · vjstv.com
Marketing & Content
Vibe Networking

High-signal networking and community infrastructure for builders. Connecting conviction-aligned founders across sectors and geographies.

Live · joinvibe.net
Venture Studio
Axal VC

High-throughput venture studio operating as an API. StudioOS-native, combining AI-driven scoring, automated company formation, and a global partner network to spin out and fund startups at scale.

Live · axal.vc
Blockchain · Content
OnConsensus

Decentralized tech publication channel exploring blockchain consensus mechanisms, Web3 foundations, DAOs, and onchain innovation.

Live · onconsensus.com
Digital Infrastructure
Axal IO

Modular digital infrastructure platform delivering high-performance, environmentally responsible systems across sectors through integrated IT, energy, and resource layers.

Live · axal.io

Signal · Not Noise

The Filter

"If everyone is telling you No — come to me."

Conviction

If your idea is popular, I'm probably too late. Non-consensus or nothing.

Infrastructure

I don't invest in features. Rails, protocols, and engines only.

The Early Check

No 40-page deck required. A working prototype and an obsession will do.

DO NOT PITCH UNLESS YOU ARE RIGHT →
